whatWasImplemented: src/lib/billing/page-model.ts — pure view-model helper. buildBillingViewModel() maps {profile, plans, invoices, now} into a discriminated BillingState + StatusPill tone + trialCountdownDays + nextInvoiceIso + capped invoice list + two CTA booleans (showUpgradeCta, showPortalCta). Covers every state/date branch out of subscription-gate.

src/app/dashboard/billing/page.tsx — server component. Parallel-fetches profile + plans, then fetches last-12 invoices from Stripe when stripe_customer_id exists. Renders: trial banner (if trialing), plan card with status pill + price + next-invoice date, manage-billing/upgrade CTAs (via client actions), 3-up plan grid, and invoice table with Stripe-hosted PDF links.

src/app/dashboard/billing/client-actions.tsx — 'use client' BillingAction button. POSTs to /api/stripe/{checkout,portal,change-plan}, redirects on {url}, reloads otherwise. Pending state + inline error — no toast system yet (M4 adds sonner).

src/app/api/stripe/change-plan/route.ts — POST {plan_id}. Auth + profile lookup + existing-subscription guard. Calls stripe.subscriptions.update with items=[{id, price}] and proration_behavior='create_prorations' — Stripe proration (upgrade -> invoice, downgrade -> credit) flows automatically.

src/__tests__/billing-page-model.test.ts — 10 unit tests exercising every state branch (no_subscription, trialing, expired-trial, active, past_due, canceled_active, canceled_expired) plus status-pill tones (Canceling for active+cancel_at_period_end) and invoice cap-at-12 invariant.

src/__tests__/stripe-change-plan.test.ts — 5 unit tests: 401 (auth), 400 (missing plan_id, no subscription, empty items defensive), happy path verifying proration_behavior='create_prorations' lands in the Stripe update args.
whatWasLeftUndone: UI assertions VAL-BILLING-002 (logged-in-sees-plan-options vs current-plan), VAL-BILLING-003 (trial countdown visible), VAL-BILLING-024 (12-invoice table), VAL-BILLING-025 (next-invoice date visible) are implemented in code but their contract entries specify 'browser automation' as the tool. Marked 'pending' in validation-state.json pending the Playwright user-testing pass (same pattern foundation milestone used for deferred AUTH assertions).

VAL-BILLING-001 marked 'passed' because the dashboard/layout.tsx already redirects unauthenticated users to /login — the billing page is under that layout, so the redirect chain is deterministic and testable without a browser.

Real Stripe test-mode keys not yet swapped in. Page renders fine with stripe-mock; invoice list will be empty until stripe-mock has prior invoices or Brandon swaps in sk_test_... + real customer history.
discoveredIssues: vitest hoisting trap: mock function references in vi.mock() factories must be declared via vi.hoisted(); reinforced the convention after applying it a second time in stripe-change-plan.test.ts.

Plan-card CTA logic: 'Switch' for existing subscribers calls the change-plan route; 'Start Starter/Pro/Scale' for pre-subscription users calls checkout. Kept as two different intents because checkout (no subscription yet) and subscriptions.update (has subscription) are non-interchangeable Stripe APIs.
Plans query uses anon-readable RLS (added in M2F1). Verified the server-side user client can read plans without service-role escalation.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 295 passed / 1 skipped / 40 files (+15 new: 10 page-model + 5 change-plan). 0 regressions.
